#  Create a Drawing Set 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' permissions on the Drawings tool.  
OR  
'Read Only' or 'Standard' permissions with the ['Upload Drawings' or 'Upload and Review Drawings' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) enabled on your permission template.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * You can only create a new drawing set when you upload drawings.
    * You can only upload PDF (.pdf) files.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click **Upload**.
  3. Click **Attach Files** and select one or more drawing PDF files to upload.
     * _To attach files from your computer_ :1. Make sure **My Computer** is selected in the window.2. Drag and drop one or more files into the 'Drag and Drop' box.  
OR   
Click **Attach File(s)** to browse your computer and select the files.
     * _To attach files from the project's Documents tool_ :
       1. Click **Documents** in the window.
       2. Mark the checkbox next to a folder that you want to attach files from.
  4. Click **Attach**.
  5. Click the **Select or Create Set** drop-down menu.
  6. Type a name for the new drawing set in the Search field.  
_Note_ : The set name must be less than 100 characters.  
![Create Drawing Set](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8a23c07cfee77a676d40b33882a13a86/446447a8edec099dc53cec4544c9852c/create-drawing-set.png?fm=webp)
  7. Click **Create Set**.
  8. Fill out the information for the drawings as necessary (see [Upload Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-bidding-and-estimating-integration/upload-drawings) for more detail).
  9. Click **Process**.


## See Also
  * [Upload Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/upload-drawings)
  * [Upload Drawing Revisions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/upload-drawing-revisions)
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
